CVE-2009-1143.title: An issue was discovered in open-vm-tools 2009.03.18-154848. Local ...
CVE-2009-1143.description: An issue was discovered in open-vm-tools 2009.03.18-154848. Local users can bypass intended access restrictions on mounting shares via a symlink attack that leverages a realpath race condition in mount.vmhgfs (aka hgfsmounter).

CVE-2025-22247.title: VMware Tools contains an insecure file handling vulnerability. A  ...
CVE-2025-22247.description: VMware Tools contains an insecure file handling vulnerability. A malicious actor with non-administrative privileges on a guest VM may tamper the local files to trigger insecure file operations within that VM.
